title: Python
html:
Stub. First explicit Apple-Notes mention in 2021 05 06 230 zoom interview ("start python programming"); reinforced in 2021 08 11 fall todo cluster ("continue with python course").

The programming language Yahir picks up as a self-study target in spring 2021 and carries through OSU CS coursework, malware analysis lab tooling, and the Bromenu / Rankett build cycles.

Mentions

  • 2021 05 06 230 zoom interview — start python programming
  • 2021 08 11 fall todo cluster — continue with python course

related.label: C++ not Python — CS 161 summer-prep + Chiquito's graduation
Decompiled ned.exe (NED32.py) — Fernet ransomware targeting MAC `00:0C:29:EB:E8:84`
Fall-2021 todo cluster — chiropractor, OSU waitlist, python
FLARE-VM terminal — pyinstxtractor.py crashes with bad magic number
Reverse-engineering ned.exe — Discord help from 'Ethanol' on PyInstaller extract + uncompyle6
